references/tool-doc-audit.md: Find and audit stale documentation for outdated content, broken links, and drift from source code — flags docs that no longer match the codebase.
references/tool-doc-orchestrator.md: Orchestrates and coordinates documentation workflows across the project — manages the documentation pipeline including doc generation, audit, and updates.
references/tool-deep-review.md: End-to-end code review before merging a PR — comprehensive multi-pass analysis covering security, quality, tests, and correctness across all changed files.
concepts/tool-bug-predict.md: Predicts production bugs by spotting risky code changes before merging — identifies which files are most likely to break, finds potential runtime errors before deployment, and catches eval injection, bare exceptions, incomplete code paths, and high-defect-rate functions via pattern matching and cyclomatic complexity.
references/tool-bug-predict.md: Spots risky code changes before merging — identifies files most likely to break, finds potential runtime errors and deployment risks, predicts bugs via cyclomatic complexity, change-frequency hotspots, bare-except patterns, and unfinished code paths.
concepts/tool-fix-test.md: Automatically diagnoses and fixes failing tests and CI pipeline failures by classifying root causes — import errors, mock mismatches, assertion drift, type errors, fixture issues, environment problems — and applies targeted fixes with retry logic up to 3 attempts.
quickstarts/skill-fix-test.md: Auto-diagnoses and repairs failing tests and CI pipeline failures by classifying root causes — import errors, assertion drift, mock mismatches, type errors, fixture issues — and applies targeted fixes with up to three re-run attempts.
concepts/tool-release-prep.md: Preflight checklist verifying health, security, changelog, dependencies, and version consistency to produce a go/no-go assessment before publishing to PyPI or tagging a release.
references/tool-release-prep.md: Pre-release go/no-go assessment covering health checks, security audit, changelog verification, dependency vulnerabilities, and release readiness before publishing to PyPI or tagging a release.
